jelatine::cldc::io::URL Class Reference

Package Attributes

String name
String scheme
String target
String params

Detailed Description

This class stores URL format as described in RFC 2396. This takes the general form:
{scheme}:[{target}][{params}]
where {scheme} is the name of a protocol such as http.
The {target} is normally some kind of network address.
Any {params} are formed as a series of equates of the form ";x=y". Example: ";type=a".

Definition at line 35 of file URL.java.
